case_title: DAN MOTTAZ VIDEO PRODUCTIONS, LLC VS RENEE CHANTLER, ESQ.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JUDGEMENT DEBTOR EVIDENCING FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT, FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAN MOTTAZ VIDEO PRODUCTIONS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RENEE CHANTLER, ESQ. $3,610.00 PRINCIPAL, $169.73 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,779.73 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT RENEE CHANTLER, ESQ. HEARING SET FOR JUL-16-2007 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
